task_description: Implement MK's final 3-layer architecture: (1) Thinking Layer - small 3B model for reasoning-only output, (2) Decision/Action Layer - MK's custom engine for tool execution and response formatting, (3) Memory/Context Layer - existing graph + history. Plus multi-provider API management with /setkey, /status Telegram commands, intelligent routing based on urgency/size/availability, encrypted key storage, Nvidia NIM support, and request logging.
